subject: Additional Information Needed
body_text:
Hello,

Please see the attached. This will also be mailed to you today.

Thank you,

Kati

Kati Tilton, Operations Manager
Clackamas County Housing Authority
13930 S. Gain St.
Oregon City, OR 97045
Primary: 971-201-8582
Secondary: 503-650-3436
Office: 503-655-8267
www.clackamas.us<http://www.clackamas.us/>
Clackamas County Hours of Operation:
Monday-Thursday 7am-6pm
